setup.fieldsNote: Both field names and values are included in the prompt.

setup.designIntentPlaceholder: Share more ideas with the Agent here...
status.busyHint: Calling the engine and refreshing the canvas, please wait.
status.iterateHint: Continue making requests in the chat below; parameter and asset changes will take effect on the next submission to the agent.
status.setupHint: Configure dimensions, fields, and assets first, then submit to the agent via the chat or the generate button.
status.cliOutputPlaceholder: CLI output from workspace submissions will appear here.
status.noCliLogs: The current backend does not provide CLI streaming logs here.
status.firstDraftSynced: [final] First draft synced to the canvas.
status.editSynced: [final] Edit results synced to the canvas.
status.proxyApplied: Proxy port {proxy} applied; all subsequent runtime requests will use it
status.psdCompositeOnlyWarning: PSD exported. No independent layer candidates were found in the current design, so only a composite layer was exported.
status.loadingDetail: Please wait, the workbench is preparing the current content.
status.generatingDetail: The Agent is creating your design, please wait...
status.notShellCommand: This is not an executable shell command
status.selectProviderModel: Please select a provider and model
status.sessionNoPreCreate: The current backend does not require pre-creating a session
status.claudeLoginFailed: Claude Code login failed to start
status.approvalNotSupported: The current backend does not support real-time approval callbacks
status.completeClaudeLogin: Please complete Claude Code login first
status.waitingOpencodeWarmup: Waiting for OpenCode to warm up...
canvas.emptyHint1a: Submit your requirements via the chat panel on the right to start designing
canvas.emptyHint1b: Configure parameters and assets in the left menu first for better results
canvas.emptyHint2a: Configure the Agent in the Runtime menu on the left
canvas.emptyHint2c: Option 1: Enter your own API Key in OpenCode
canvas.emptyHint2d: Option 2: Sign in from Codex or other menus to use your subscription
confirm.deleteDesignMessage: Delete design "{name}"? This will remove the entire workspace and commit history for this design.
confirm.discardChangesMessage: The fullscreen editor has unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them and exit?
confirm.commandNeedsConfirm: This command requires confirmation before it can proceed.
confirm.approvalNotSupported: Approval callbacks are not yet available in this version.
history.latestCommitHint: The canvas shows the agent's latest commit. After changing any parameters, submit to the agent again to update the preview.
history.readyHint: The workspace is ready. Configure parameters, then submit your first design request via the chat or the generate button.
history.noSessionHint: After generating the first draft, the design library, chat timeline, and git commit history will appear here.
history.browsingHint: You are viewing a historical commit. Continuing to edit will regenerate from the current preview and create a new commit.
history.latestHint: The current preview corresponds to the latest commit in the design workspace.
history.noDesignsHint: Click "New Design", then generate the first draft.
history.noCommitsHint: Generate or edit the current design first, then reviewable commits will appear here.
inspect.noDesignHint: After generating or loading a design, all directly editable strings will be listed here.
inspect.noEditableHint: The current design has no text nodes with `data-editable`, so direct editing is not available here.
styles.noStylePreview: Relies solely on your request and context; no preset visual language is applied.
styles.noStyleSubtitle: No palette, fonts, or style rules applied
styles.noStyleSummary: Let the agent follow your natural language request primarily, without adding preset layout aesthetics, palettes, or font constraints.
assets.dropHint: Drag and drop images, SVGs, and reference assets directly.
assets.notePlaceholder: Note the purpose, croppable area, or placement of this asset.
assets.emptyLibraryHint: After importing images, SVGs, textures, or reference elements, you can bind them to the current design.
runtime.webModeHint: Currently in web mode. Desktop runtime is only available in the Tauri client.
runtime.codexNotDetected: Codex CLI not found. Packaged builds use the built-in runtime by default; in development, run desktop:prepare-runtime first or specify a custom path.
runtime.codexLoginFirst: Complete Codex login before sending agent prompts. Codex reuses the same thread within the current design workspace.
runtime.codexReady: Codex is ready, waiting for a new prompt.
runtime.claudeNotDetected: Claude Code CLI not found. Packaged builds use the built-in runtime by default; in development, you can also specify a local path manually.
runtime.claudeLoginFirst: Complete Claude Code login before sending agent prompts. Claude reuses the same session within the current design workspace.
runtime.claudeReady: Claude Code is ready, waiting for a new prompt.
runtime.geminiNotDetected: Gemini CLI not found. In development, install Gemini CLI first or enter the executable path here.
runtime.geminiReady: Gemini CLI is ready, waiting for a new prompt.
runtime.opencodeNotDetected: OpenCode runtime not found. Packaged builds use the built-in binary by default; in development, run desktop:prepare-runtime first or specify a custom path.
runtime.opencodeStartHint: After clicking "Start OpenCode", the desktop client will start a local server in the current project directory, allowing you to create sessions and send agent prompts.
runtime.opencodeRunning: OpenCode is running, waiting for a new prompt or shell command.
runtime.codex.description: Sign in with your ChatGPT account to use
runtime.codex.pathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in runtime by default
runtime.claude.description: Claude Code is not bundled with this software. Install it separately if needed.
runtime.claude.pathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in runtime by default
runtime.gemini.description: Sign in with your Google account to use
runtime.gemini.pathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default command name gemini
runtime.opencode.description: Use API Keys from OpenRouter, model providers, or proxy services
runtime.opencode.configDesc1: Enter your API Key, select the corresponding provider (e.g. OpenRouter), then choose the model you want to use.
runtime.opencode.configDesc2: Base URL can usually be left empty.
runtime.opencode.pathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in runtime by default
runtime.opencode.baseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the official default endpoint
runtime.opencode.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to skip writing the apiKey
runtime.opencode.apiKeyPlaceholderSaved: Saved locally. Leave empty to keep the current key
runtime.auth.codexStatusDefault: Codex login status not yet detected.
runtime.auth.codexVerifyHint: "Logged in" only means local credentials exist; click "Verify Connection" to actually send a Codex request.
runtime.auth.claudeStatusDefault: Claude Code login status not yet detected.
runtime.auth.claudeVerifyHint: After logging in, click "Verify Connection" to actually send a Claude Code request.
runtime.auth.geminiStatusDefault: Gemini CLI login status not yet detected.
runtime.auth.geminiVerifyHint: Gemini CLI uses the ACP login flow; after logging in, click "Verify Connection" directly.
runtime.auth.opencodeHint: Enter the API Key for the current provider and configure the model; small_model and the provider's baseURL can be set as needed.
runtime.auth.codexLocalNote: This only means local credentials are saved; it does not guarantee network availability.
runtime.auth.codexLocalAction: Click "Verify Connection" first; to switch accounts, use "Device Code Login" or "Browser Login".
runtime.auth.codexNotLoggedIn: Codex is not logged in. Please complete Codex login in the Runtime menu, then resend this message.
runtime.auth.claudeNotLoggedIn: Claude Code is not logged in. Please complete Claude Code login in the Runtime menu, then resend this message.
runtime.auth.geminiNotLoggedIn: Gemini is not logged in. Please complete Gemini login in the Runtime menu, then resend this message.
runtime.shell.notShellHint1: Shell only executes real terminal commands.
runtime.shell.notShellHint3: Slash commands like `/help` are not shell commands; if you want to talk to the agent, use natural language and click "Run Agent" instead.
chat.waitingHint: After submitting a request in the chat, the agent will start working, output the execution process and commands below, and finally render the design to the canvas.
chat.editPlaceholder: e.g. Increase the title font size by 20%, change the background to dark blue, add a gold divider at the bottom.
chat.designPlaceholder: e.g. Create a vintage jazz poster, make the title bolder, warm stage lighting, keep the paper texture.
chat.codexExecuted: Codex has executed the current request.
chat.codexShellExecuted: Codex has executed the current shell request.
chat.agentStarting: Starting the agent for the current session and waiting for the first structured event.
chat.analyzing: Analyzing and planning the next step.
chat.hiddenSource: The agent returned full source code, hidden in the console.
chat.shellExecHint1: Execute the following shell command in the current workspace.
chat.shellExecHint2: You must actually run this command, not explain what it does.
chat.shellExecHint3: Return the results, error output, and whether any files were changed in a concise format.
runtime.approvalTransportNote: {backend} transport does not currently support in-session approval callbacks.
canvas.fullscreen.clickToEdit: Click editable text on the canvas
canvas.fullscreen.editHint: Click on text with highlighted borders on the canvas to edit it here.
canvas.fullscreen.editNote: Changes are only kept in the fullscreen draft; click "Save" to write them back to the design.
export.proxyApplyFailed: Failed to apply proxy and restart OpenCode: {error}
runtime.refresh.partialFailed: Some runtime states failed to refresh: {errors}
runtime.refresh.geminiModelTimeout: Gemini model list fetch timed out.
runtime.refresh.geminiModelFailed: Failed to fetch Gemini model list: {error}
runtime.refresh.claudeModelTimeout: Claude model list fetch timed out.
runtime.refresh.claudeModelFailed: Failed to fetch Claude model list: {error}

about.intro: DesignCode is an agent-based graphic design workbench that transforms simple instructions into high-quality design drafts. It supports production-grade features such as vector-level lossless output, multi-layer PSD export, art asset management, and style presets. In areas like multi-turn instruction following, editability, and text rendering, it offers advantages that traditional AI image generation models cannot match.
about.introScope: DesignCode supports a wide range of graphic design needs, including but not limited to posters, postcards, product detail pages, media promotional graphics, static web designs, book covers, and typographic layouts — any scenario involving text content.
about.publisher: DesignCode is published by the Haruhi Suzumiya Dev Group.
about.publisherDetail: The Haruhi Suzumiya Dev Group is an affiliate of the Haruhi Suzumiya Fan Club, dedicated to creating more projects that make the world a more exciting place.
about.publisherLink: Feel free to submit your application to join via haruhifanclub@outlook.com!

about.thirdPartyDetail: Codex CLI (Apache-2.0), Gemini CLI (Apache-2.0), and OpenCode (MIT) are bundled with this application. See the NOTICE file for full attributions.
about.claudeNotice: Claude Code is proprietary software owned by Anthropic PBC and is not distributed with this application. Install it separately to use the Claude Code backend.
